---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new capability
title: '[Feature] '
labels: 'enhancement'
assignees: ''
---

<!--
Wrangle is a purpose-built editor for AI development workflows. Feature
requests grounded in concrete AI-dev use cases (skills, agents, system
prompts, MCP configs, XML-in-markdown patterns) are the most likely to land.

Please read CONTRIBUTING.md before filing if you haven't already — major
architectural changes are unlikely to be accepted.
-->

## Problem

<!-- What are you trying to do that Wrangle doesn't currently support, or
supports awkwardly? Describe the underlying need, not the solution. -->

## Proposed solution

<!-- How would you like Wrangle to behave? Sketch the UI / interaction if
that helps — bullet points are fine. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- What workarounds or other approaches have you tried? Why didn't they
work? If you've solved this in another editor, what did that look like? -->

## AI-dev-workflow context

<!--
Tell me where this fits in your AI development workflow. For example:
  - Which files are you working with? (CLAUDE.md, SKILL.md, AGENTS.md,
    system prompts, MCP configs, plain markdown notes, …)
  - Which tools or agents are in the loop? (Claude Code, Cursor, custom
    pipelines, …)
  - Where does Wrangle currently fit, and where does this proposal change
    that?

Requests that are not grounded in an AI-dev workflow may be closed without
discussion — Wrangle is intentionally scoped, and "general markdown editor"
features have a high bar.
-->

## Additional context

<!-- Mockups, screenshots, links to related projects, anything else. -->
